race.comment: THE KING'S UNCLE (2) pulled up with cardiac arrhythmia first-up and has been back to the trials since. He's much better than he showed there and should improve with the run under his belt. The rise in trip is a big tick and he can bounce back to his best form. UNDERCOVER SNIPER (5) is racing well without winning recently but carries no weight today after the claim of Li. The draw makes things tricky, but he looks well placed on his recent form and he can end his winning drought. PULL THE TRIGGER (8) finished 12th over 1410m at Geraldton at his most recent appearance on October 23. Worth plenty of thought. IRONCLAD BOY (3) was beaten 7 lengths into ninth in a 1413m contest at Geraldton at his latest appearance. Likely improver with strong top-three prospects. AWESOME LILY (9) can improve third-up into the campaign after a disappointing run as favourite most recently.
